meaning: adj.暗示的,盲从的,含蓄的,固有的,不怀疑的,绝对的
examples: Recent research on consumer memory and judgment suggests another advantage of implicit conclusions.
Despite these advantages, implicit conclusions may not always be more effective than explicit conclusions.
Because consumers are invited to make up their own minds, implicit conclusions reduce the risk of resentment, distrust, and counterargumentation.
But in Ithkuil ambiguity is quashed in the interest of making all that is implicit explicit.
Implicit in this model is a recognition that that which is self-serving leads to suffering.
